raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Joakas bija diwideſmits
un trihs Gaddus wezz / kad
wiꞥſch par Rehninu tappe/ un
waldija trihs Meneschus Jeru-
saleme. Un winna Mahtei bija
Amutala Wahrdã/ Jereintiafa
Meita no Libnas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGAM ne patikke/ itt
tã patt ka winna Tehwi bij
darriſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Warauſs Nekus zee-
tinaja to Riblatã eekſch tahs
Semines Eemata / ka tam Je-
rusaleme ne bij waldiht/un wiꞥſch
ustike tai Semmẽ Meſlus doht/
fimts Talentus Sudraba / un
weenu Talentu Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Warauſs Nekus dar-
rija Elijakimu Joſius Dehlu par
Rehninu winna Tehwa Joſius
Weetã / un deꞥe winnam zittu
Wahrdũ (un fauze to) Joja-
kim. Bet Joakasu nehme wiꞥſch
lihds/ un nahze us Egipti / un
nomirre tur.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jojakims dewe Warau-
um to Sudrabu un Seltu. Bet
wiꞥſch nehme Meſlus no tahs
Semmes/ ka tas to Sudrabu
pehz Warauſs Pawehleschann
dohtu/ ikkatru meſloja wiꞥſch
pehz winna Padohmu to Su-
drabu un Seltu doht/starp tahs
Semmes Laudim / ko tain bij
Warauſs Nekum doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jojakims btja diwideſ-
mits un peezus Gaddus wezz /
kad wiꞥſch par Rehninu tappe/
un waldija weenpadeſmits Gad-
dus Jerusaleme. Un winna
Mahtei bija Sebuda Wahrdã/
Pedajus Meita no Rumas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGAM ne patikke /
pehz wiſſu/ ko winna Tehwi bij
darriſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Inna Laika zehlahs
Nebudkadnezars tas
Babeles Rehninsch us
aufschu / un Jojakims tappe
winnam trihs Gaddus par Kal-
pu/ pehz nowehrsahs wiꞥſch/un
atkahpe no hira.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS fuhtija
prett winnu to Kaldeëru Pulkns/
un to Sihreçu Pulkns/ un to
Moabiteçu Pulkns/ un to Am-
moniteçu Behrnu Pulkns/ un
fuhtija tohs prett Juhdu winnu
nomaitaht / pehz ta KUNGÃ
Wahrdũ/ ko wiꞥſch bij runnajs
zaur faweem Kalpeem teem Pra-
weefcheem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teetcham pehz ta KUNGA
Wahrdã tas Juhdam ta notik-
ke/ ka wiꞥſch tohs no jewis at-
mesiu Manaffus Grehku deht/
ko wiꞥſch bij darrijs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
